pattern: DiffOperation' does not contain a definition for 'Type'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid 'Type' member with the correct 'Operation' property of DiffOperation and compare it against the Aspose.Pdf.DiffOperationType enum.

pattern: DiffOperation' does not contain a definition for 'PageIndex'
fix_guidance: Use the correct property name (e.g., DiffOperation.PageNumber) or upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf.Comparison version that provides the PageIndex property.

pattern: DiffOperation' does not contain a definition for 'OperationType'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'OperationType' member with the correct 'Operation' property (e.g., diff.Operation) and ensure the appropriate Aspose.PDF namespace is imported.

pattern: Operator '\?' cannot be applied to operand of type 'Operation'
fix_guidance: Remove the null‑conditional operator or make the operand nullable; for enums like Operation, use diff.Operation.ToString() directly.

pattern: DiffOperationType
fix_guidance: Replace the undefined DiffOperationType with the correct enum (e.g., Operation) from Aspose.Pdf and add the necessary using directive.

pattern: DocSaveOptions\.DocFormat' does not contain a definition for 'Docx'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid enum value 'Docx' with the correct member name 'DocX' (case‑sensitive) when setting DocSaveOptions.Format.

pattern: DocSaveOptions\.DocFormat does not contain a definition for 'Docx'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid enum value with the correct member, e.g., use DocSaveOptions.DocFormat.DocX instead of Docx.

pattern: PptxSaveOptions' does not contain a definition for 'ProgressEventType'
fix_guidance: Remove or replace the nonexistent ProgressEventType property; use the appropriate progress event (e.g., SaveOptions.ProgressEventHandler) or omit it when configuring PptxSaveOptions.

pattern: HtmlSaveOptions\.CssSavingInfo' does not contain a definition for 'CustomProcessingCancelled'
fix_guidance: Remove or replace the nonexistent CustomProcessingCancelled property; use only the supported HtmlSaveOptions properties or upgrade to a version of Aspose.PDF that includes it.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Slides' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Slides library (e.g., via NuGet) or correct the using directive to reference the proper assembly.

pattern: JpegDevice': type used in a using statement must implement 'System.IDisposable'
fix_guidance: Do not place JpegDevice in a using block; instantiate it normally and dispose the Document instead, as JpegDevice does not implement IDisposable.

pattern: Source file '.*\.editorconfig' could not be found
fix_guidance: Ensure the referenced editorconfig file is generated or present (e.g., run the build step that creates it or clean and rebuild), or remove the invalid file reference from the project.

pattern: Top-level statements must precede namespace and type declarations
fix_guidance: Move any top‑level statements (e.g., code outside a class) before namespace/type declarations or place the code inside a Main method within a class.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ICustomHtmlSavingStrategy' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Reference the Aspose.Pdf.Html assembly (or upgrade the Aspose.Pdf package) and add `using Aspose.Pdf.Html;` so the ICustomHtmlSavingStrategy and HtmlSavingStrategyInfo types are available.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'XslFo' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.XslFo assembly (or install the Aspose.Pdf.XslFo NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf.XslFo;).

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'VerticalAlignment'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of TextFragmentState.VerticalAlignment with the TextFragment object's VerticalAlignment property (or upgrade to a version of Aspose.Pdf that includes this property).

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'GenerateToc'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to Document.GenerateToc; instead create a TocInfo object, configure its Title and other settings, assign it to a newly inserted page (doc.Pages.Insert) and let Aspose.Pdf generate the TOC via the TocInfo.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'ConvertToSvg'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Page.ConvertToSvg call with Aspose.Pdf's SVG conversion API (e.g., use SvgDevice or Document.Save with SvgSaveOptions) and add the required Aspose.Pdf.Devices namespace.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'PageSize'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the non‑existent PageSize member with the PageInfo property (e.g., page.PageInfo.Width, page.PageInfo.Height, page.PageInfo.IsLandscape) or use the SetPageSize method.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CallBackGetHocr' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains CallBackGetHocr and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;`).

pattern: Cannot create an instance of the abstract type or interface 'Signature'
fix_guidance: Replace the abstract Signature instantiation with a concrete subclass such as PKCS7 (e.g., `PKCS7 pkcs7 = new PKCS7(pfxPath, pfxPassword);`) and use that object for signing.

pattern: Cannot open '.*AsposePdfApi_.*\.dll' for writing -- The process cannot access the file .* because it is being used by another process
fix_guidance: Stop any running process that has loaded the DLL (e.g., previous instance of the app, test runner, or Visual Studio), then clean the project or delete the obj folder before rebuilding.

pattern: There is no argument given that corresponds to the required parameter 'formattingMode' of 'TextExtractionOptions\.TextExtractionOptions\(TextExtractionOptions\.TextFormattingMode\)'
fix_guidance: Pass a TextFormattingMode enum value (e.g., TextExtractionOptions.TextFormattingMode.Pure) to the TextExtractionOptions constructor.

pattern: TextExtractionOptions' does not contain a definition for 'TextFormattingModeEnum'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'TextFormattingModeEnum' with the correct 'TextFormattingMode' enum (e.g., TextExtractionOptions.TextFormattingMode.Pure) or update to a version of Aspose.PDF that includes the enum.

pattern: TextExtractionOptions\.TextFormattingMode' does not contain a definition for 'PreserveLayout'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.PDF for .NET version that includes the PreserveLayout enum value, or replace it with a supported TextFormattingMode value.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Image' to 'System\.Drawing\.Image'
fix_guidance: Use the Aspose.Pdf.Image overloads or convert the Aspose.Pdf.Image to a System.Drawing.Image (e.g., via a memory stream) before passing it to methods expecting System.Drawing.Image.

pattern: Could not write to output file.*AsposePdfApi\.sourcelink\.json
fix_guidance: Ensure the obj/Debug/... directory exists and you have write permissions (clean the obj folder or disable SourceLink generation) so the compiler can create the sourcelink.json file.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'System\.IO\.FileStream' to 'System\.Security\.Cryptography\.X509Certificates\.X509Certificate2'
fix_guidance: Create and pass an X509Certificate2 object (e.g., new X509Certificate2(certPath, password)) instead of a FileStream, and supply a DigestHashAlgorithm enum value (e.g., DigestHashAlgorithm.SHA256) rather than a string.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'OutlineItem' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'OutlineItem' with the correct Aspose.Pdf class name (e.g., OutlineItemBase) and ensure `using Aspose.Pdf;` is present.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a constructor that takes \d+ arguments
fix_guidance: Use a constructor overload that matches the available parameters (e.g., FileSpecification(string filePath) or the parameterless constructor) and set the remaining properties manually.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Portfolio'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Portfolio API with Document.Collection: instantiate Document.Collection if null and add FileSpecification objects via Collection.Add.

pattern: Use of unassigned local variable 'link'
fix_guidance: Initialize the variable 'link' before it is read, ensuring every code path assigns a value (e.g., set it to null or a default string).

pattern: The variable '.*' is assigned but its value is never used
fix_guidance: Remove the unused variable or reference it in the code to eliminate the warning.

pattern: PageSize' does not contain a definition for 'Letter'|Rotation' does not contain a definition for 'Rotate90'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent members with valid Aspose.PDF enum values, e.g., use PageSize.A4 (or another supported size) instead of PageSize.Letter, and use Rotation.On90 instead of Rotation.Rotate90.

pattern: Source file '.*AsposePdfApi\.AssemblyInfo\.cs' could not be found
fix_guidance: Clean the project (delete the obj folder) and rebuild, or enable automatic AssemblyInfo generation by setting <GenerateAssemblyInfo>true</GenerateAssemblyInfo> in the .csproj.

pattern: Source file '.*AsposePdfApi\.GeneratedMSBuildEditorConfig\.editorconfig' could not be found
fix_guidance: Make sure the referenced .editorconfig file exists at the specified path or remove the missing file reference from the project file.

pattern: PrinterSettings' is an ambiguous reference between
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using its fully qualified name (e.g., System.Drawing.Printing.PrinterSettings) or create a using alias, and remove or qualify the conflicting Aspose.Pdf.Printing namespace.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'EmbeddedFile' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.dll (or the appropriate NuGet package) and include the correct namespace, or replace 'EmbeddedFile' with the valid class name such as 'EmbeddedFileCollection' from Aspose.Pdf.

pattern: There is no argument given that corresponds to the required parameter 'exception' of 'CrashReportOptions\.CrashReportOptions\(Exception\)'
fix_guidance: Pass the caught exception to the CrashReportOptions constructor, e.g., `new CrashReportOptions(exception)` instead of using the parameterless constructor.

pattern: Source file '.*AsposePdfApi\.GlobalUsings\.g\.cs' could not be found
fix_guidance: Clean the project (delete the obj folder) and rebuild so the missing GlobalUsings.g.cs file is regenerated; verify the target framework and SDK support global usings.

pattern: cannot reference a type through an expression; try 'Document\.OptimizationOptions' instead
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Document.OptimizationOptions usage with the new Aspose.Pdf.Optimization.OptimizationOptions API (e.g., create an OptimizationOptions instance and pass it to pdfDoc.OptimizeResources).

pattern: error CS1010: Newline in constant
fix_guidance: Close the string literal properly—use a verbatim string (prefix with @) or escape line breaks and quotes so the constant does not span multiple lines.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'XYZExplicitDestination' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf;`) so the `XYZExplicitDestination` type is recognized.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a constructor that takes \d+ arguments
fix_guidance: Instantiate TextBoxField using the (Page, Rectangle) constructor (e.g., new TextBoxField(page, rect)) and set properties like PartialName separately.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'GoToAction' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf library version that contains GoToAction and include the proper using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;`).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'DefaultAppearance' could not be found
fix_guidance: Remove references to the non‑existent 'DefaultAppearance' type and set appearance via the TextFragment's TextState (e.g., Font, FontSize, ForegroundColor) instead.

pattern: Property or indexer 'TextFragment\.TextState' cannot be assigned to
fix_guidance: Do not assign a new TextState to TextFragment.TextState; instead modify the existing TextState's properties (e.g., FontSize, Font) or create a new TextFragment with the desired settings.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'RadioButtonOption' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms'
fix_guidance: Remove the direct reference to RadioButtonOption and use Form.GetButtonOptionValues (or upgrade to a version of Aspose.Pdf that includes RadioButtonOption) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced.

pattern: Dereference of a possibly null reference
fix_guidance: Ensure the object is not null before accessing its members, e.g., add a null‑check or use the null‑conditional operator (?.) to safely dereference.

pattern: Could not write to output file.*sourcelink\.json
fix_guidance: Ensure the obj directory exists and you have write permissions (clean the project or delete the obj folder) so the compiler can create the sourcelink.json file, then rebuild.

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Action'
fix_guidance: Stop accessing Annotation.Action; use Aspose.Pdf's HiddenDataSanitizer (with HiddenDataSanitizationOptions) to remove or modify actions, or add the correct Aspose.Pdf.Annotations reference if that property is required.

pattern: Cell' does not contain a definition for 'ColumnSpan'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.PDF for .NET version that includes the Cell.ColumnSpan property, or replace the usage with supported table‑cell spanning APIs available in your current library version.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Fonts' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Fonts assembly (install the Aspose.Pdf.Fonts NuGet package) or remove/replace the Fonts usage with a supported namespace.

pattern: FileAttachmentAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'IconNames'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'IconNames' member with the correct 'IconName' property (or use the appropriate enum value) provided by Aspose.Pdf.FileAttachmentAnnotation.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Epub' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Epub assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Pdf.Epub NuGet package) and ensure the correct using directive is present.

pattern: AnnotationType' does not contain a definition for '(ThreeD|Redact)'
fix_guidance: Remove or comment out the unsupported AnnotationType members (ThreeD, Redact) or upgrade to a Aspose.PDF version that defines them.

pattern: TextFragment.*DefaultAppearance
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the non‑existent DefaultAppearance property with the TextState object (e.g., title.TextState.Font, FontSize, and ForegroundColor) to set font attributes.

pattern: Document does not contain a definition for 'SanitizeHiddenData'
fix_guidance: Reference Aspose.Pdf.Security.HiddenDataSanitization, create a HiddenDataSanitizer (with HiddenDataSanitizationOptions) and call sanitizer.Sanitize(document) instead of Document.SanitizeHiddenData.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Saving' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Saving namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Saving;`) or fully qualify the types, and ensure the Aspose.Pdf package version includes the Saving namespace.

pattern: ProgressEventHandlerInfo could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly (or the appropriate NuGet package) and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;` in the source file.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System\.IO\.Stream'
fix_guidance: Pass a Stream (e.g., File.OpenRead(path) or a MemoryStream) to the method instead of a string file path.

pattern: Property or indexer 'TextAbsorber\.Text' cannot be assigned to
fix_guidance: Do not assign to TextAbsorber.Text; it is read‑only—create a new TextAbsorber for each page (or reuse it without resetting) and read its Text property instead of setting it.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ProgressEventHandlerInfo' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.UnifiedSaveOptions namespace (or the appropriate Aspose.Pdf assembly) and include `using Aspose.Pdf.UnifiedSaveOptions;` at the top of the file.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'FieldNames'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Forms and use the Form.Fields collection (e.g., var fields = doc.Form?.Fields) instead of the non‑existent FieldNames property.

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Title'
fix_guidance: Cast the Annotation to a MarkupAnnotation (or a derived type that defines Title) before accessing the Title property, e.g., `if (annotation is MarkupAnnotation markup && markup.Title == ...)`.

pattern: PdfFileEditor' does not contain a definition for 'Dispose'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to Dispose on PdfFileEditor (it doesn't implement IDisposable); use the appropriate cleanup method (e.g., Close) or rely on the object's own resource management.

pattern: Property or indexer 'TextStamp\.TextState' cannot be assigned to
fix_guidance: Do not assign a new TextState to TextStamp.TextState; instead modify the existing TextState's properties (e.g., stamp.TextState.Font = ..., stamp.TextState.FontSize = ...).

pattern: Rotation' does not contain a definition for 'Rotate90'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid enum member with the correct value (e.g., use Rotation.on90) or refer to the proper rotation API provided by Aspose.PDF.

pattern: CrashReportOptions' does not contain a definition for 'CrashReportFileName'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent CrashReportFileName property with the correct CrashReportDirectory (or other valid property) on CrashReportOptions and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: TextAnnotation' does not contain a constructor that takes 0 arguments
fix_guidance: Use a constructor overload that supplies required arguments (e.g., new TextAnnotation(page, rect)) instead of the parameterless constructor.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.FieldType' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Store the result of GetFieldType in a FieldType variable (or cast to string via .ToString()) instead of assigning it to a string.

pattern: Form' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Form' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms\.Form'
fix_guidance: Add an alias or use the fully qualified name (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form) to specify which Form class you intend to use.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'FlattenAnnotations'
fix_guidance: Replace the call to FlattenAnnotations() with the correct method name FlatteningAnnotations() provided by PdfAnnotationEditor.

pattern: No overload for method 'DeleteAnnotations' takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Call DeleteAnnotations with a single string argument (the annotation type) or use the correct overload signature as defined in Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

pattern: Could not write to output file '.*?sourcelink\.json' -- 'Could not find file '.*?sourcelink\.json'.'
fix_guidance: Ensure the output directory (obj/... ) exists and you have write permissions; delete the obj folder to clean stale files or disable SourceLink generation, then rebuild.

pattern: Heading' does not contain a definition for 'NumberingStyle'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the Heading.NumberingStyle property, or use the appropriate alternative API for heading numbering in the version you have.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Annotation' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` at the top of the file.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'NUnit' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the NUnit NuGet package (or reference the assembly) to the project and ensure `using NUnit.Framework;` is present, or provide minimal stub definitions if testing without the package.

pattern: Cannot convert null literal to non-nullable reference type
fix_guidance: Assign a non‑null value or change the variable/type to a nullable reference (e.g., use string? instead of string).

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'ReadOnly'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent ReadOnly property with a check on the annotation's Flags, e.g., `(annotation.Flags & AnnotationFlags.ReadOnly) == AnnotationFlags.ReadOnly`, or upgrade to a version of Aspose.PDF that includes the ReadOnly property.

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'PageNumber'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a recent Aspose.Pdf for .NET version where the Annotation class includes the PageNumber property, or cast to a specific annotation type that provides the page number.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'CreateAnnotation'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent CreateAnnotation call with a supported method such as AddAnnotation (after constructing an annotation object) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace is imported.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'CreateText'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'CreateText' call with the correct method name (e.g., 'CreateTextAnnotation') and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Facades namespace and assembly are referenced.

pattern: Program does not contain a static 'Main' method
fix_guidance: Add a static Main method to a class (e.g., Program) or change the project output type to a Class Library if no executable entry point is needed.

pattern: The best overload for 'ModifyAnnotationsAuthor' does not have a parameter named 'startPage'
fix_guidance: Call ModifyAnnotationsAuthor with positional arguments (or correct parameter names) that match an existing overload, removing the nonexistent 'startPage' named argument.

pattern: The best overload for 'ModifyAnnotations' does not have a parameter named 'pageIndex'
fix_guidance: Call ModifyAnnotations using positional arguments (e.g., ModifyAnnotations(1, 1, txtAnn)) and remove the named 'pageIndex' parameter.

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'ModificationDate'
fix_guidance: Cast the Annotation to MarkupAnnotation (e.g., 'if (ann is MarkupAnnotation markup)') and use markup.Modified (or markup.CreationDate) instead of Annotation.ModificationDate, because only markup annotations expose date properties.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'AnnotationType' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that defines AnnotationType and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` at the top of the file.

pattern: No overload for method 'CreateBookmarks' takes 8 arguments
fix_guidance: Update the call to match the current API signature—use the available overload (e.g., CreateBookmarksAction with named parameters) or remove/adjust arguments to fit the method's defined parameters.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmarks' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmark\[\]'
fix_guidance: Use the Bookmarks collection returned by ExtractBookmarks (or call .ToArray()) instead of assigning it to a Bookmark[] variable, and iterate over the collection accordingly.

pattern: Bookmark' does not contain a constructor that takes 1 arguments
fix_guidance: Do not instantiate Bookmark directly; use the Bookmarks collection returned by PdfBookmarkEditor.ExtractBookmarks() (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmarks) and iterate over it.

pattern: ^warning CS8600: Converting null literal or possible null value to non-nullable type\.$
fix_guidance: Initialize the variable with a non‑null value, make the target type nullable, or use the null‑forgiving operator (!) after the expression.

pattern: Bookmark' does not contain a definition for 'Color'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent Bookmark.Color property and set the bookmark color via its TextState (e.g., bm.TextState = new TextState { ForegroundColor = Color.Red };) or use the appropriate color property for the Aspose.Pdf version you are using.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'int' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Devices\.Resolution'
fix_guidance: Replace the integer with a Resolution object, e.g., `var resolution = new Resolution(300);` or `new Resolution(horizontalDpi, verticalDpi)` before assigning.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Cells' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Cells assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Cells NuGet package) or remove the incorrect using directive.

pattern: No overload for method 'Add' takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Use an overload that matches the Aspose.Pdf API – either call Add with the correct signature (e.g., Add(string title, int pageNumber)) or create a Bookmark object and pass that to Add, instead of supplying two mismatched arguments.

pattern: Resolution could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Devices namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;`) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced in the project.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ImageFormat' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to System.Drawing.Common (or System.Drawing) and include `using System.Drawing.Imaging;`, then use `ImageFormat.Tiff` instead of `Aspose.Pdf.ImageFormat.Tiff`.

pattern: Bookmark' does not contain a definition for 'DestinationPage'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'DestinationPage' member with the correct API, e.g., use bookmark.Destination?.PageNumber (or bookmark.Destination.PageNumber) to obtain the target page.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Resolution' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Devices namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;`) or ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly containing the Resolution class is referenced.

pattern: FontRepository' does not contain a definition for 'SetDefaultFont'
fix_guidance: Replace calls to SetDefaultFont and AddFontSubstitutes with the new FontRepository.Substitutions API, e.g., FontRepository.Substitutions.Add(new SimpleFontSubstitution("Symbol", "Arial Unicode MS"));

pattern: PdfConverter' does not contain a definition for 'ConvertPageToImage'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent ConvertPageToImage call with the correct PdfConverter methods (e.g., BindPdf, DoConvert, then GetNextImage) and ensure you reference Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'FontSubstitutions'
fix_guidance: Replace Document.FontSubstitutions with FontRepository.Substitutions using SimpleFontSubstitution.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CoordinateType' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Replace 'CoordinateType' with the correct enum 'PageCoordinateType' (e.g., converter.CoordinateType = PageCoordinateType.CropBox) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Resolution' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades'
fix_guidance: Import the correct namespaces (e.g., add `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;` and use `Aspose.Pdf.Devices.Resolution`) or reference the appropriate Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains the `Resolution` and `PageCoordinateType` types.

pattern: Resolution
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Devices (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;`) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced in the project.

pattern: RenderingOptions' does not contain a definition for 'FontSubstitution'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent RenderingOptions.FontSubstitution with FontRepository.Substitutions (e.g., FontRepository.Substitutions.Add(new SimpleFontSubstitution("Helvetica", "Arial"))).

pattern: PdfFileEditor' does not contain a definition for '(BindPdf|Close)'
fix_guidance: Replace PdfFileEditor with the Document class for loading PDFs, as PdfFileEditor does not provide BindPdf or Close methods; use Document constructor to open the file.

pattern: No overload for method 'Insert' takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Call the Insert overload that matches Aspose.PDF: use Document.Pages.Insert(int index, Document sourceDocument, int[] pageIndices) with the correct argument order and types.

pattern: No overload for method 'Insert' takes 4 arguments
fix_guidance: Call an Insert overload that matches the provided argument count and types, or modify the arguments to fit an existing overload signature.

pattern: PdfFileEditor' does not contain a definition for 'Split'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Split' call with the correct PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages method (or another valid method) and pass the appropriate input file path and output template.

pattern: PdfFileEditor' does not contain a definition for 'BindPdf'
fix_guidance: Replace PdfFileEditor with Aspose.Pdf.Document (and import Aspose.Pdf) because PdfFileEditor lacks BindPdf, Document, and Close members; use Document to load and work with PDFs.

pattern: PdfPageEditor' does not contain a definition for 'RotatePage'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of PdfPageEditor.RotatePage with the Document API: load the PDF into a Document, set the desired page's Rotate property (e.g., doc.Pages[1].Rotate = Rotation.on90), and save the document.

pattern: PageSize' does not contain a definition for 'Letter'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent PageSize.Letter with a valid size, e.g., `editor.PageSize = new PageSize(612, 792);` (8.5" x 11" in points) or use another supported PageSize enum value.

pattern: PageInfo' does not contain a definition for 'Rotate'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Rotate method with the Rotate property: set page.PageInfo.Rotate = RotationAngle.Rotate90 (or another enum value) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: type used in a using statement must implement 'System.IDisposable'
fix_guidance: Do not place PdfFileEditor in a using block; instantiate it directly (e.g., var editor = new PdfFileEditor();) because it does not implement IDisposable.

pattern: PageCollection' does not contain a definition for 'NUp'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent PageCollection.NUp call with PdfFileEditor.MakeNUp (or the appropriate API method) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace/assembly that provides this method is referenced.

pattern: The name 'PageSize' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add a using directive for Aspose.Pdf or fully qualify the enum as Aspose.Pdf.PageSize.

pattern: The best overload for 'Insert' does not have a parameter named 'sourceFile'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent 'sourceFile' named argument and call PdfFileEditor.Insert with the correct overload signature (e.g., Insert(string inputPdf, int[] pages, string outputPdf) or Insert(string inputPdf, int startPage, int endPage, string outputPdf)).

pattern: type used in a using statement must implement 'System\.IDisposable'
fix_guidance: Do not wrap PdfFileEditor in a using block; instantiate it directly (e.g., var editor = new PdfFileEditor()) because it does not implement IDisposable.

pattern: Converting null literal or possible null value to non-nullable type
fix_guidance: Pass a non‑null value or add a null‑check before the call, or change the target parameter/type to be nullable.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'VisualStudio' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the MSTest framework (e.g., install the Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk and MSTest.TestFramework NuGet packages) or provide minimal stub definitions for the Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting namespace.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<string>' to 'System\.Collections\.IList'
fix_guidance: Change the target variable to IList<string> (or another generic collection) or cast explicitly, e.g., IList list = (IList)genericList.

pattern: ImportFormat' does not contain a definition for 'Jpeg'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of ImportFormat.Jpeg (which is not defined) with the appropriate Aspose.Pdf API, e.g., load the JPEG via Aspose.Pdf.Image and add it to a Document page, or use the correct enum from Aspose.Pdf.Facades if needed.

pattern: The name 'SaveType' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf;`) or fully qualify the enum as `Aspose.Pdf.SaveType`.

pattern: PdfFileStamp\.InputFile' is obsolete.*Use BindPdf\(inputFile\) method
fix_guidance: Replace usage of PdfFileStamp.InputFile with the BindPdf(inputFile) method and PdfFileStamp.OutputFile with the Save(outputFile) method.

pattern: Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'System.Drawing.Rectangle' and 'Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Rectangle type (e.g., System.Drawing.Rectangle or Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle) or create a using alias to disambiguate the reference.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'System\.Drawing\.Printing\.PrinterSettings' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Printing\.PrinterSettings'
fix_guidance: Replace System.Drawing.Printing.PrinterSettings with Aspose.Pdf.Printing.PrinterSettings (or map the required properties) when calling Aspose PDF printing APIs.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'PageAction'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent PageAction property with the correct Page.Actions property (e.g., doc.Pages[i].Actions.OnOpen) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: .*'(?<type>\w+)' is an ambiguous reference between '.*' and '.*'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using its fully‑qualified name or create a using alias (e.g., `using AsposeColor = Aspose.Pdf.Color;`).

pattern: PdfFileStamp\.PdfFileStamp\(string, string\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete PdfFileStamp(string, string) constructor with the parameterless PdfFileStamp() and bind the PDF using BindPdf, or use the Document API for stamping.

pattern: PdfContentEditor' does not contain a definition for 'SetBookmarksParent'
fix_guidance: Remove or replace SetBookmarksParent calls; the method was removed in recent Aspose.Pdf versions—use PdfBookmarkEditor or the current bookmark API (e.g., CreateBookmarksAction) instead.

pattern: The name 'ImageFormat' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add a reference to System.Drawing.Common (or the appropriate assembly) and include `using System.Drawing.Imaging;` or fully qualify the type as `System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat`.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ViewerPreferences' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf;`) and replace `ViewerPreferences` with the correct enum name `ViewerPreference`.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'double' to 'float'
fix_guidance: Use float literals (e.g., 100f) or cast the double values to float (e.g., (float)myDouble) before passing them to methods expecting float parameters.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'KeySize' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add the correct using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Security;`) or reference the appropriate Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains the KeySize enum.

pattern: Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Rectangle type (e.g., System.Drawing.Rectangle) or create a using alias to specify which Rectangle you intend to use.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Outline' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains the Outline class and include the correct using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Outline;`).

pattern: Permissions' does not contain a definition for 'ModifyDocument'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Permissions.ModifyDocument with a valid permission flag (e.g., Permissions.Modify or use DocumentPrivilege.Modify) that exists in the Aspose.PDF API.

pattern: PrinterSettings' is an ambiguous reference
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the type (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Printing.PrinterSettings) or create a using alias to disambiguate the conflicting PrinterSettings classes.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'RenderingOptions' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;`, or replace the use of RenderingOptions with the newer device API (e.g., PngDevice) that does not require that class.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Resolution' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Devices and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;` (or fully qualify the class) because the Resolution class resides in that namespace.

pattern: PdfFileSecurity\.PdfFileSecurity\(string, string\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete constructor with the parameter‑less PdfFileSecurity(), call BindPdf(sourcePath) to load the PDF, then after encryption call Save(destinationPath).

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.TextStamp' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Stamp'
fix_guidance: Use the Document API instead of the PdfFileStamp facade: load the PDF with a Document, call page.AddStamp(stamp) for each page, and then save; TextStamp is not a Facades.Stamp.

pattern: DefaultMetadataProperties' does not contain a definition for 'Creator'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent DefaultMetadataProperties.Creator with the literal XMP property name (e.g., "dc:creator") or use the correct constant provided by Aspose.Pdf for the creator field.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.[^']+' to 'System\.Drawing\.[^']+'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle/Color arguments with System.Drawing.Rectangle and System.Drawing.Color (e.g., construct a System.Drawing.Rectangle from the rectangle's coordinates and use System.Drawing.Color.Transparent or convert the Aspose color to a System.Drawing color).

pattern: '.+?' is an ambiguous reference between '.+?' and '.+?'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the type with its namespace or define a using alias (e.g., `using AsposeRect = Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle;`) to remove the ambiguity.

pattern: PdfFileStamp\.(InputFile|OutputFile)' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete InputFile/OutputFile property assignments with the new facade methods: call BindPdf(inputPdf) to set the source PDF and Save(outputPdf) to write the result.

pattern: PdfContentEditor' does not contain a definition for 'PageNumber'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of the non‑existent PageNumber property with the appropriate API, e.g., pass the page number to methods like CreateFileAttachment or work with Aspose.Pdf.Document and its Pages collection instead of PdfContentEditor.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.[A-Za-z]+' to 'System\.Drawing\.[A-Za-z]+'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf types with the corresponding System.Drawing types (e.g., use System.Drawing.Rectangle and System.Drawing.Color) when calling PdfContentEditor methods.

pattern: StampAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'BlendMode'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent BlendMode property with the correct property (e.g., BlendingSpace) or use the Stamp class which supports BlendMode; ensure you reference the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<string>' to 'string\[\]'
fix_guidance: Convert the IList<string> to an array with .ToArray() or change the target variable type to IList<string>.

pattern: Annotation does not contain a definition for 'Opacity'
fix_guidance: Cast the retrieved annotation to the concrete annotation type (e.g., SquareAnnotation) that provides an Opacity property, then set the opacity on that casted instance.

pattern: The name 'TextAnnotationIcon' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` and reference the enum as `TextAnnotationIcon.Note` (or another valid value) instead of an undefined identifier.

pattern: TextStamp.*does not contain a definition for 'PageNumber'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of the non‑existent PageNumber property with Document.Pages[pageIndex].AddStamp(textStamp) (or use PdfFileStamp facade) to apply the stamp to a specific page.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'System.DateTime'
fix_guidance: Assign a DateTime value (e.g., DateTime.UtcNow) to the property or parse the string to DateTime using DateTime.Parse/ParseExact instead of assigning a formatted string.

pattern: Argument 2: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle' to 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Pass a System.Drawing.Rectangle (and System.Drawing.Color) to CreateJavaScriptLink, or convert the Aspose types to the corresponding System.Drawing types.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'ViewerPreferences'
fix_guidance: Use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.ChangeViewerPreference (or upgrade to a version where Document.ViewerPreferences exists) and add a using Aspose.Pdf; directive if needed.

pattern: '[A-Za-z]+' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.[A-Za-z]+' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.[A-Za-z]+'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate by using fully‑qualified names (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle) or create an alias with a using directive (e.g., using PdfRect = Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle) for the conflicting types.

pattern: .*'Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle'.*
fix_guidance: Remove the conflicting `using System.Drawing;` directive or qualify the types (e.g., `Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle` and `Aspose.Pdf.Color`) or create aliases to disambiguate.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.(Rectangle|Color)' to 'System\.Drawing\.(Rectangle|Color)'
fix_guidance: Pass a System.Drawing.Rectangle and System.Drawing.Color (or convert the Aspose.Pdf types to their System.Drawing equivalents) to the method; create new System.Drawing objects with the same dimensions/color before calling CreateSquareCircle.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PdfException' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.dll) and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf;).

pattern: TextAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'IsOpen'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent IsOpen property with the correct property (e.g., Open) or use a PopupAnnotation to control visibility, matching the API version you reference.

pattern: ExtractImageMode' does not contain a definition for 'AllImages'
fix_guidance: Replace 'ExtractImageMode.AllImages' with a valid enum value such as 'ExtractImageMode.DefinedInResources' (or the appropriate mode for your Aspose.Pdf version).

pattern: Color' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Color' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color'
fix_guidance: Remove the conflicting using directive or fully qualify the type (e.g., use Aspose.Pdf.Color) to eliminate the ambiguity.

pattern: Stamp' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Stamp' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Stamp'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate by using the fully‑qualified type name (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Stamp) or create a using alias for the desired Stamp class.

pattern: TextAnnotation.*does not contain a definition for 'FillColor'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FillColor property with the correct property (e.g., BackColor or Color) for TextAnnotation and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace is referenced.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'CreateSquareCircle'
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete PdfAnnotationEditor façade with the current Aspose.Pdf.Annotations API (e.g., create a SquareAnnotation or CircleAnnotation on a Document page) and remove the Facades using directive.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'System\.Drawing\.RectangleF' to 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Pass a System.Drawing.Rectangle (int‑based) to the method—e.g., create a new Rectangle from the RectangleF values or use Rectangle.Round—to match the expected parameter type.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle' to 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Pass a System.Drawing.Rectangle (or convert the Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle to one) to the method; e.g., create a new System.Drawing.Rectangle with the same dimensions.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle' to 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle and Aspose.Pdf.Color arguments with System.Drawing.Rectangle and System.Drawing.Color (or convert them) when calling PdfContentEditor methods.

pattern: Argument 4: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color' to 'System\.Drawing\.Color'
fix_guidance: Convert the Aspose.Pdf.Color value to a System.Drawing.Color (e.g., use System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(color.A, color.R, color.G, color.B)) before passing it to the method.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor does not contain a definition for 'CreateText'
fix_guidance: Replace 'CreateText' with the correct Aspose.Pdf API method (e.g., CreateTextAnnotation) and ensure you reference the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace or update to a version that includes the method.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Azure' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'
fix_guidance: Add the appropriate Azure SDK NuGet packages (e.g., Microsoft.Azure.WebJobs, Azure.Storage.Blobs) and include the required using directives such as `using Microsoft.Azure;` or `using Microsoft.Azure.WebJobs;`.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Amazon' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the required AWS SDK NuGet package (e.g., AWSSDK.Core) to the project and include the appropriate using directive, then run a restore.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PutObjectRequest' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Storage.Cloud SDK (install the NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive, e.g., `using Aspose.Storage.Cloud.Sdk.Model;`.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Value'
fix_guidance: Cast the WidgetAnnotation to the specific field type that exposes a Value property (e.g., TextBoxField) or use the appropriate property/method for the annotation type.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Azure' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Azure.Storage.Blobs NuGet package (or the appropriate Azure SDK) and ensure the using directive `using Azure.Storage.Blobs;` is present.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Document'
fix_guidance: Create or load an Aspose.Pdf.Document (e.g., new Document(filePath)) and pass that object instead of a string path to the method.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<.*>' to 'System\.Collections\.IList'
fix_guidance: Change the variable type to IList<string> (or another generic interface) or cast the value, e.g., (IList)myList, to match the expected non‑generic IList.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TextFragment' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include the directive `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;` (or fully qualify as `Aspose.Pdf.Text.TextFragment`).

pattern: The type name 'OleDbConnection' could not be found in the namespace 'System\.Data\.OleDb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.OleDb assembly (e.g., install the System.Data.OleDb NuGet package) and include `using System.Data.OleDb;` in the source file.

pattern: Preprocessor directive expected
fix_guidance: Delete or replace stray ‘#’ characters (PowerShell comments) with C# comments (//) so the file starts with valid C# code such as using statements or a namespace.

pattern: AutoFiller\.InputFileName
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the obsolete InputFileName property with the new BindPdf(inputFile) method to initialize the facade.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'bool' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.ExtractImageMode'
fix_guidance: Replace the boolean with a valid ExtractImageMode enum value (e.g., ExtractImageMode.AllImages) or cast appropriately; do not assign true/false to this property.

pattern: AutoFiller\.Save\(\)'.*obsolete.*Use Save\(destination\)
fix_guidance: Replace calls to AutoFiller.Save() with AutoFiller.Save(destination) providing a file path or stream where the PDF should be saved.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PdfA2bSaveOptions' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf library that contains PdfA2bSaveOptions (or upgrade to a version that includes it) and include the appropriate using directive; alternatively, use the newer Convert method with PdfFormat.PDF_A_2B for PDF/A‑2b compliance.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'AspNetCore' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'
fix_guidance: Add the appropriate Microsoft.AspNetCore.* NuGet packages (e.g., Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc) and ensure the project targets a compatible .NET version, or remove the AspNetCore references if they are not needed.

pattern: warning CS8600: Converting null literal or possible null value to non-nullable type
fix_guidance: Add a null‑check before the assignment or change the target type to be nullable (e.g., string?) or use the null‑forgiving operator (!).

pattern: AutoFiller\.InputFileName' is obsolete|AutoFiller\.Save\(\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete AutoFiller members: use BindPdf(inputFile) to set the source PDF and call Save(destinationPath) to write the result.

pattern: AutoFiller\.InputFileName' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the obsolete InputFileName property with the BindPdf(inputFile) method on the AutoFiller instance.

pattern: Could not write to output file '.*AsposePdfApi\.sourcelink\.json' -- 'Could not find file '.*AsposePdfApi\.sourcelink\.json'.'
fix_guidance: Make sure the output directory exists and you have write permissions (e.g., delete the stale obj folder or clean the project) then rebuild.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.DateTime' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Convert the DateTime to a string (e.g., DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")) or change the target variable/property to DateTime instead of string.

pattern: Non-nullable property '.*' must contain a non-null value when exiting constructor
fix_guidance: Make the property nullable (e.g., string?) or mark it as required, and ensure it is assigned a non‑null value before the constructor finishes.

pattern: CS2012: Cannot open '.*AsposePdfApi_.*\.dll' for writing -- The process cannot access the file .* because it is being used by another process
fix_guidance: Terminate any process that is locking the DLL (e.g., stop running instances, close the IDE, or kill lingering dotnet processes), then clean the build output (dotnet clean or delete the obj/bin folders) before rebuilding.

pattern: TextStamp' does not contain a definition for '(SetOrigin|Rotation)'
fix_guidance: Replace SetOrigin with XIndent/YIndent properties and Rotation with RotateAngle, and apply the TextStamp using Document/Page.AddStamp (or PdfFileStamp) instead of the missing members.

pattern: PdfFileStamp' does not contain a definition for 'Pages'
fix_guidance: Replace PdfFileStamp with a Document/PageNumberStamp approach, or use PdfFileStamp.AddStamp(pageNumber) instead of accessing a non‑existent Pages property.

pattern: ImageStamp' does not contain a definition for 'Margin'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Margin property with XIndent/YIndent (or other positioning properties) on ImageStamp to set offsets.

pattern: An object reference is required for the non-static field, method, or property 'DocumentFactory\.CreateDocument\(string\)'
fix_guidance: Call the instance method (or use the Document constructor) instead of invoking DocumentFactory.CreateDocument as a static method.

pattern: The type or namespace name '.*' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the required using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf.Forms) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced in the project.
